title: Multiplexed RNA-sequencing of 1M immune cells reveals the cellular, molecular, and genetic correlates of systemic lupus erythematosus

title: Multiplexed scRNA-seq reveals the cellular and genetic correlates of systemic lupus erythematosus
n_patients: 162 SLE donors + 99 healthy individuals on GEO; dbGaP v1 reports 160 cases + 98 controls and 258 consented subjects
notes: Source: https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/query/acc.cgi?acc=GSE174188; related dbGaP study phs002812.v1.p1 https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/projects/gap/cgi-bin/study.cgi?study_id=phs002812.v1.p1; GEO verifies Homo sapiens, multiplexed scRNA-seq, PBMCs, 162 SLE donors and 99 healthy individuals, 88 samples, and states raw and processed data are controlled-access through dbGaP due to privacy; GEO record also says raw and processed data are not provided on this record; Patient ID availability unclear; Activity labels unclear; Treatment and batch metadata unclear; Open processed object availability not assumed; Training usability not approved; External validation usability not approved; no full data downloaded.
